title: DevVM Config
description: Configuration for the minimal devvm create CLI.

schema_version.description: Schema version for the devvm config format.

cloud_init.description: Relative or absolute path to the checked-in cloud-init file.

mount.description: Optional repo-scoped host mount attached after launch.

host_path.description: Host directory to mount into the VM. Supports relative paths and ~/ expansion.

guest_path.description: Absolute target path inside the guest.

privileged.description: Whether the create flow should set local.privileged-mounts before mounting.

name.description: Optional Multipass instance name. If omitted, the CLI derives one from the project directory.

ubuntu_release.description: Ubuntu release passed to multipass launch, for example 24.04.

cpus.description: Number of virtual CPUs for the VM.

memory.description: VM memory size using Multipass units such as 4G or 512M.

disk.description: VM disk size using Multipass units such as 30G.
